rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HUSAM MOUSA QANA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine why no petition for final distribution has been filed yet, despite Letters having been issued to the administrator (not an executor) on 9/21/20. [Probate Code Section 12200.] No I&A has been filed yet either, when it should have been filed within four months from the date Letters were issued. [Probate Code Section 8800(b).] Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINA Q NIELSEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES: 1) Competing petitions for probate. a) Both petitioners claim priority, although the petition filed by Rito (Jesus under a POA), did not ask for Rito to be appointed until after Manuela filed her petition and claimed priority as a sibling (with priority over a nominee of a sibling). 2) The parties may be asked if they have agreed on a neutral third party. 3) The Court to determine whether to grant the petition.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KALVIN M. MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/16/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Neither the proof of service filed on 2/22/22 nor the proof of publication filed on 2/23/22 shows that a SECOND AMENDED petition was filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] Item 3g(4) does not appear to be true, as no personal representative was previously appointed. Item 4 of the second amended petition was answered, although the decedent reportedly died intestate. No waivers of bond have been filed or were attached to the pleading, as alleged in item 3e(3). When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Item 8 of the second amended petition still does not identify the decedent's parents and their dates of death. [LRSF 14.18 C.3.] The second amended petition also appears to be incomplete, as compared to the original petition now superseded by this pleading [CRC 7.3.] A SUPPLEMENT to the second amended petition, prepared on pleading paper and signed and verified by the petitioner, must be filed to address these issues and submit any papers that were not attached to the second amended petition. A courtesy copy of the supplement and of the proof of publication of the second amended petition must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 5/5/22. Please do NOT file another amended petition, unless it is COMPLETE and accurate, and proper notice is given of it. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCINE MARIE DOUGLASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/18/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Monica A. Douglass has priority to serve as administrator under Probate Code 8461. Please file a declination to serve/nomination from Monica A. Douglass. 2) Notice did not include the language required by the 10th Amended General Order for the Probate and Mental Health Division found on the court's website. Please re-notice with the required language. 3) Please file Duties and Liabilities judicial council form DE-147. 4) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 5) Please file proof of publication. 6) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 4/4/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
